title: Home page loads and browsing rows are viewable
description: Verifies the home page primary content loads and the user can scroll through anime rows.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down the page
Scroll down the page
Verify multiple anime rows with anime cards are displayed

title: Browse categories journey: Home to Latest to TV Series
description: Verifies users can navigate between core browse categories and view their primary content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to view the latest episodes
Scroll down the page
Click the navigation link to view TV series
Verify a TV series listing with anime cards is displayed

title: Movies page shows loading then populates rows
description: Verifies the movies page displays a loader while fetching and then renders movie rows.

steps.description: Navigate to /movies
Verify a loading indicator is visible
Wait for the page content to finish loading
Verify movie rows with anime cards are displayed

title: Schedule page displays schedule list entries
description: Verifies the schedule page primary content is viewable by scrolling through the schedule list.

steps.description: Navigate to /schedule
Scroll down the page
Verify schedule entries are displayed

title: Navigate from a browse card to a details page (from TV Series listing)
description: Verifies users can open an anime details page from a browse listing.

steps.description: Navigate to /tv-series
Scroll down the page
Click an anime card
Verify an anime details view is displayed with synopsis and metadata

title: Search with query and filters returns results and allows opening a result
description: Verifies searching with a query plus genre/type/year filters shows results and a result can be opened.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Fill a common anime title keyword into the search query field
Select a genre filter
Select a type filter
Select a year filter
Submit the search
Click a search result item
Verify an anime details view is displayed with synopsis and metadata

title: Search with restrictive filters shows a no-results state
description: Verifies the search page shows a no-results state when an uncommon query plus restrictive filters returns nothing.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Fill an uncommon search term into the search query field
Select multiple filters to be highly restrictive
Submit the search
Verify a no-results state with suggestions is displayed

title: Search with query only returns results
description: Verifies basic search without filters returns a results list.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Fill a common anime title keyword into the search query field
Submit the search
Verify search results are displayed

title: Submitting empty search does not crash and keeps user on search page
description: Verifies submitting the search form without a query is handled gracefully via UI behavior.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Submit the search
Verify the search interface remains usable and a results or empty state is displayed

title: Change filters after results updates the result set
description: Verifies users can adjust filters after an initial search and see updated results.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Fill a common anime title keyword into the search query field
Submit the search
Select a different genre filter
Submit the search
Verify search results are displayed for the updated filter selection

title: Anime details shows synopsis/metadata and allows selecting an episode to watch
description: Verifies the details page shows primary information and episode selection navigates into playback flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /tv-series
Click an anime card
Scroll down to the episodes section
Click an episode from the episodes list
Verify the video player view is displayed

title: Characters section populates on anime details
description: Verifies users can reach the characters section and see character list content.

steps.description: Navigate to /tv-series
Click an anime card
Scroll down to the characters section
Verify a character list is displayed

title: Episodes list is browseable via scrolling within details page
description: Verifies users can browse the episode list on the details page as a core interaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /tv-series
Click an anime card
Scroll down to the episodes section
Scroll down the page
Verify the episodes list is displayed and includes multiple entries

title: Open details from Latest episodes listing
description: Verifies cross-page entry into anime details from the latest episodes page works.

steps.description: Navigate to /latest
Scroll down the page
Click an anime item from the latest episodes list
Verify an anime details view is displayed with synopsis and metadata

title: Starting playback from details keeps player usable on load
description: Verifies that after navigating to the player from details, core playback UI loads without requiring external actions.

steps.description: Navigate to /tv-series
Click an anime card
Scroll down to the episodes section
Click an episode from the episodes list
Verify the player shows a video area and playback controls

title: Video player page loads and initializes playback UI
description: Verifies the player can be reached from the home page and displays playable video content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click an anime item from a row to open its details
Click an episode to start watching
Verify the video player is displayed and ready for playback

title: Play, change quality, seek, fullscreen, and go to next episode
description: Verifies the core end-to-end playback controls and episode navigation work from the player UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click an anime item from a row to open its details
Click an episode to start watching
Start video playback
Open quality settings and select a different available quality
Seek forward on the video timeline
Toggle fullscreen mode
Navigate to the next episode
Verify playback is working on the newly opened episode

title: Pause and resume continues playback
description: Verifies pausing and resuming playback works and the video continues from the paused position.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click an anime item from a row to open its details
Click an episode to start watching
Start video playback
Wait for a short time for playback to progress
Pause video playback
Resume video playback
Verify the video is playing and progresses after resuming

title: Navigate between next and previous episode from player
description: Verifies episode navigation controls allow moving forward and back between episodes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click an anime item from a row to open its details
Click an episode to start watching
Navigate to the next episode
Navigate to the previous episode
Verify the player updates to the previous episode and playback UI remains functional

title: Quality selection persists for current session during navigation within player
description: Verifies selecting a quality remains applied when moving to the next episode within the player.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click an anime item from a row to open its details
Click an episode to start watching
Open quality settings and select a specific available quality
Navigate to the next episode
Open quality settings
Verify the previously selected quality is still selected or the player indicates an active quality selection

title: Retry control is available when playback fails to start
description: Verifies that when playback cannot start, the UI shows an error state with a retry option.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click an anime item from a row to open its details
Click an episode to start watching
Wait for the player to attempt loading
Verify that if a playback error is shown, a retry loading control is available

title: Retry loading stream returns to normal player state
description: Verifies that using retry from the player error state attempts to load again and returns to playback-ready UI when successful.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click an anime item from a row to open its details
Click an episode to start watching
Wait for the player to attempt loading
If a playback error is shown, trigger retry loading stream
Verify the player returns to a playback-ready state or begins playback

title: Redirect unauthenticated user from Watch History
description: Ensures unauthenticated users cannot access watch history and are prompted to authenticate or redirected.

steps.description: Navigate to /history
Verify the user is prompted to authenticate or is redirected to a login entry point

title: Watch History loads for authenticated user and shows continue watching
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can load the Watch History page and see a continue-watching section.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open watch history
Verify a continue-watching section is displayed

title: Resume watching from continue-watching item
description: Validates that selecting a continue-watching item navigates to the player and resumes from the saved position.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open watch history
Select a continue-watching item to resume
Verify the video player is displayed and playback resumes from a non-zero position

title: Watch progress is visible per episode in history list
description: Ensures the watch history UI displays progress information per episode for items shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open watch history
Verify at least one history item shows watch progress information

title: Continue-watching item opens correct episode details in player UI
description: Checks that resuming from history opens a specific episode context in the player (not just a generic page).

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open watch history
Select a continue-watching item to resume
Verify the player shows episode context (such as an episode number/title) for the selected item
